messages.content: Haan Abhi, kya tu tere mein samajh na raha hai? Kuch bhi doob dien, tumne pehle lagte hain ki to iske baad aap yeh feeling banaye... Yeh mood nahi parwana sakte ho. Tumse pata chuke hue kya tare kar rahi ho iski baar? Yeh time par hai jisme hum aise bhi kar rahi ho, tum aaj pe hi kuch doob dien! Abhii se kaha dekhte hain... Isko samajhne ka nishaan banaye. Yahan se kamse batao ki toh is baar hi apna time par hai.
Hey Abhi, how's it going? Any plans for today?

Tumhara baat par kya? Yeh time par hai ki tumhe apni plans banaye... Iski baar apna baat hote ho. Kuch bhi doob dien, tumne pata chuke hue kya aap yeh karna chahte ho yaari? Chahate ho karke kisi pe bahut sa time par hai... Abhii se kaha dekhte hain... Isko samajh nahi rahe hain ki tum ne apni plans banaya hai. Yahan se kaha dekhte hain... Iski baar hi apna time par hai.
Hello Abhi! 😊 How are you today?
Yes Abhi! What can I help you with today?
Tumhe baat karta hai ki tumhare plans banaya hai. Iski baar apna time par hai!
Haan Abhi, kya tere baat par? Yeh current time par hai ki humne aise karta hain jo apna baat par... Kaise karte ho yaari? Tumse doob dien, tumhe kuch bhi banta jaye.
Youtube open kar diya browser me.
song play kro tu hi ho
Sure Abhi! Play the song you want.
Tumhe baat par kya? Yeh current time par hai ki humne aise karta hain jo apna baat par... Kaise karte ho yaari? Tumse doob dien, tumhe kuch bhi banta jaye.
Sure Abhi! Do something nice for you.
Sure Abhi! Brightness 10% kam kar di.

Abhi, hai! Jiska bug ka screenshot aap tak khel kiya hoon? Kaise log apna timesheet nahi dhaye?

Aap kisi aur super admin ke saath login ki jaaye. After which they click on the "My Timesheets" link in sidebar. Then they check if an error modal pops up immediately or not.

If you have any screenshot, please share it with me and I'll help you analyze the issue.

Kya apne timesheet ka code aap ekhe huye hai? Abhi bhi yeh bataye to problem sehbat kar sakte hue!

Pakhala yaab kaise bug saath samjhte hein?

--- End of File ---
Haan Abhi, gud morni hai. Iske baad kaha rahe hue? Kuch bhi doob dien?
